title: Preload associations before cast_assoc
prompt: The file test_fixtures/user_no_cast_assoc_preload.ex calls cast_assoc(:posts) on a user that may not have posts preloaded — this raises at runtime. Fix the code so that cast_assoc always sees a preloaded posts list. Provide a helper function `update_user_with_posts/2` that preloads posts first via Ecto.Repo.preload/2 before building the changeset. Write to lib/my_app/blog/user_with_posts.ex.
tier_rationale: Requires recognizing the preload-before-cast_assoc runtime error and fixing with an explicit helper. Sonnet often stops at `with:` option tuning without touching the preload.
research_citation: Dashbit — Working with Ecto associations and embeds: 'Attempting to cast or change an association that was not loaded will result in a runtime error.'
